title: link/admin config record — manager view (AFB-only; not part of afb.execution.v1 wire)
description: Manager view of a BF connector config record — reuses link.user.v1.json#/$defs/sharedFields (via $ref, not redeclared, so the two views can't drift apart) plus ACL/key management fields. Never carries `connected`/`daemon`/session runtime — see link.status.v1.json.

setInput.title: afbws.link.set.request.v1 item — manager-submitted fields (create or update)
setInput.description: Manager upsert: composes link.user.v1.json#/$defs/setInputShared with admin-only extras. `bf_id` omitted means create (backend assigns/validates id and requires broker + defaults); `bf_id` present and already registered means update. Backend enforces which combination is valid, not this schema.
